positive: A whimsical, stylized jungle scene composed with strong silhouettes. The main subject is a trio of stylized tropical animals—a jaguar, a vibrant macaw, and a playful monkey—interacting with giant, oversized jungle foliage like monstera leaves and exotic ferns. The composition should be centralized and dynamic, using flat graphic design principles with bold color blocking. Focus on deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, burnt orange accents, and stark black outlines for high contrast. The style should be a mix of modern mid-century modern illustration and graphic pop art. Clean, vector-like rendering, suitable for repeat pattern or standalone apparel print, highly detailed yet simple enough for textile printing. No gradient washes, solid color fills only. Overhead composition view.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, grayscale, hyperrealism, photograph, blurry edges
